item.title: MA Budget: Community College SUCCESS Fund (7100-4002)
item.description: Anchor page for tracking SUCCESS language, funding, and wraparound-support intent through the budget process.

item.title: Will funding follow the kudos?
item.description: During a House Appropriations subcommittee hearing on Wednesday, Democrats and Republicans lauded community colleges for their critical role in preparing students for in-demand jobs. However, the question is whether appropriators will back that enthusiasm with... The post Will funding follow the kudos? first appeared on Community College Daily .

item.title: ED releases proposed Workforce Pell regs
item.description: The U.S. Education Department (ED) on Friday posted its proposed rules for the new Workforce Grant Program. The public will have 30 days to comment on the rules, starting March 9, when the official Notice... The post ED releases proposed Workforce Pell regs first appeared on Community College Daily .

item.title: MassDHE News Clips: Community Colleges
item.description: MassDHE’s community college clips often surface state-level transfer, workforce, affordability, and funding developments.

item.title: Lessons from last year’s CCIC-winning team
item.description: The Community College Innovation Challenge, co-sponsored by the American Association of Community Colleges and the National Science Foundation, challenges students to pitch a STEM-based innovation to address a real-world problem, with guidance from a faculty... The post Lessons from last year’s CCIC-winning team first appeared on Community College Daily .

item.title: Washington Watch: House Farm Bill includes new community college grant program
item.description: A committee-passed House bill to reauthorize the Farm Bill includes a new competitive grant program for community colleges to provide agricultural workforce training. The House Agriculture Committee on Thursday advanced the Food, Farm and National... The post Washington Watch: House Farm Bill includes new community college grant program first appeared on Community College Daily .
